task_completion.description: Open the Inventory Move window in iDempiere
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a window, tab, or breadcrumb titled 'Inventory Move' or 'Material Move' in the iDempiere web interface.

task_completion.description: Set the document description to 'Rebalance stock - Azalea Bush transfer'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Rebalance stock - Azalea Bush transfer' in the Description field of the Inventory Move header.

task_completion.description: Select 'Azalea Bush' as the product in the move line
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Azalea Bush' entered or selected in the Product field within the Inventory Move Line tab.
Look for the number '5' in the Movement Quantity field of the Inventory Move Line.

task_completion.description: Set different source and target locators within HQ Warehouse
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Source Locator and Target Locator fields. They must both indicate 'HQ Warehouse' (or its bins/slots) but have different specific locator values.
Look for the Document Status field showing 'Completed' or 'CO', or a visual indication that the 'Complete' document action was successfully executed.

integrity.description: Agent used the iDempiere GUI to create the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the iDempiere web interface (menus, forms, buttons) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual iDempiere application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be the iDempiere ERP system (GardenWorld client), not a text editor, spreadsheet, or mock application.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database queries to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no open terminal windows or database administration tools (like pgAdmin or psql) showing SQL INSERT or UPDATE commands for the inventory move.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an Inventory Move in the iDempiere GardenWorld client. Expected Product: 'Azalea Bush'. Expected Quantity: 5. Expected Warehouse: 'HQ Warehouse'. The document description must be exactly 'Rebalance stock - Azalea Bush transfer'. The final document status must be 'Completed', which is represented by the code 'CO' in iDempiere.
